plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Stage, commit, and push all changes in one step, with auto-generated message if none given — /ship

plugins.name: tech-writer
plugins.description: Review and rewrite documentation in place using Google's Technical Writing guidelines — /tech-writer

plugins.name: deck
plugins.description: Generate a self-contained HTML slide deck from a topic — single file, dark theme, keyboard nav — /deck

plugins.name: roadmap
plugins.description: Generate a self-contained interactive HTML Gantt chart from a markdown roadmap file — /roadmap

plugins.name: diagram
plugins.description: Generate an interactive SVG diagram (architecture, sequence, flowchart, ER) from a description — /diagram

plugins.name: monograph
plugins.description: Build a multi-page PhD-level GitHub Pages site on any topic — research, free-licensed photography, a distinctive topic-tuned design, all built by a team of parallel expert subagents and shipped to docs/ — /monograph

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: Create a GitHub PR for the current branch with auto-generated title, summary, and test plan — /pr

plugins.name: plan
plugins.description: Lightweight markdown-based tracker for bugs/features/chores/todos in docs/plan/ — /plan-init /plan-add /plan-list /plan-update /plan-close

plugins.name: issues
plugins.description: Per-issue bug/feature/incident tracker in docs/issues/ — one file per ticket with symptom/repro/root cause/fix/verification, branch-on-start, and a hard rule to align with the user before implementing — /issue-init /issue-new /issue-start /issue-close

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Audit session context and persist what matters for the next agent — decisions, dead ends, insights, and in-flight work — /handoff

plugins.name: maintenance
plugins.description: Maintenance skills for the mikersays-plugins marketplace — /sync-docs /install-marketplace /uninstall-marketplace
